title: Invisible Touch
meaning_summary: Invisible Touch still earns because it remains Genesis' cleanest mainstream pop crossover and keeps resurfacing through 1980s playlists.
revenue_drivers: The track stays active on classic-pop and 1980s playlists.
Its crossover familiarity supports wider replay than deeper catalog cuts.
Writer participation strengthens the economics of long-tail use.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes steady replay on 1980s playlists, catalog streaming, and writer-side participation.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out song position
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
